park_name: Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park

reviews.review_text:
What a great park. Great location, close to beach, cafes, shops and dog friendly. Great area for walking dogs around the lake and on the beach. Most cafes allowed dogs outside
Nice and quiet location with excellent sized caravan sites.
The amenities were modern, spotlessly clean and the showers had great water pressure.
The staff were very friendly and helpful.
We will be back again....... thank you
We stayed in a cabin nicely set out and great place to stay

Disappointing any negative reviews are basic, generic replies without an offer of a ph discussion to offer any remedy or discount from staff.

Appliances that failed to work.or faulty. Didnt cater for bedside lamp in 2nd bedrm!! Deal breaker

Great destination.Yes very clean rooms. Manicured gdns. Close transport & cafes, surf club.. Beach close.

Not enough ammenities within the grounds. No assistance when asked. Screaming kids at 5am, young teenagers roaming at night yelling out.
Nice cabins, very clean and comfortable. Ideal location, walking distance to beach . Really friendly and helpful staff. Will definitely be back.
Absolutely amazing Willa,nice and clean,beautiful smile people at reception, Love it all
We had wonderful experience with amazing staff who welcomed us with smiles , very quiet , peaceful and beautiful family and friendly atmosphere ❤️
had an amazing stay have booked allready for the same time next year

Had a wonderful stay and will be back again.
Bruce at reception was super helpful,friendly and his customer service - above and beyond to help organise for us to stay another day.
Highly recommend to stay here.

I don’t really want to give great reviews on this place, cuz everyone will come and I won’t get a site, when I want to come. Please come up when I’m not, as you will have a great time, the staff and amenities are awesome.
I just love it here. You will too

First time staying here, staff were very friendly, and accommodating for us, stayed as a group on caravan sites and they were perfect for us. So happy we rebooked for next Easter! Amenities were clean and tidy secure at night,. Loved the pool and playground. Easily walking distance to the beach, cafe, restaurants, pub, surf club, convenience store. We all Loved it!
Fabulous, immaculate, private sites and the staff are lovely
Sehr gepflegter Park mit schönen Palmen & Pflanzen. Die Stellplätze und die Wege ebenfalls gut befahrbar. Das Ensuit sehr schön ausgestattet & sauber. Das Personal am Empfang auch sehr freundlich.

Sitting in the pool on a hot day is wonderful.
Rooms in the cabins are very clean and well presented.
Great location. Clean and cosy cabins

Stayed here for a week while I went to a family members wedding, it was fantastic :) I will definitely come again, well priced, good quality, lovely little village vibe and close to the beach. Thankyou

Have been going to Alex Beach c/p for years. Love it. Close to everything. Disappointed this year with the garden maintenance. They used to be on top of mowing and edge trimming but this year we didn't see anyone around our site for the whole 5 weeks. Embarrassing when we had visitors. Rain wasn't the problem. We had great weather.
Stunning area with lovely hosts. Everything is presented to such a high standard. I thoroughly enjoyed my time here. It's also in an excellent location!

Had an en-suite powered caravan site.|Small. En-suite good if u were a midget. Not enough room to swing a cat.|No door on shower just small glass wall.|Water went out opening onto other floor and toilet.|Leak in wall from outside..|Had to shower in the corner to stop water.|I had to buy mats. Won’t be going back. Rated 2 out of 10

Booked power site with en-suite.
Ensuite had a leak. No door on shower. Water went all into where toilet was. Extremely small en-suite. Shower toilet hand basin.
I had to buy rubber mats so water would not go outside opening. Short shower wall.
Small sites.
Expensive.
1 star for toilet and 1 for shower
Won’t be going back

Beautiful location and very central.  Stayed in a cabin. Was nice but no fresh towels for the entire stay. Door didn't lock properly and fridge didn't work. Was a bit frustrating...price was good. Little noisy at night with kids running around but guess that's typical for a caravan park. Just be prepared for that.

We have just spent 7 delightful days here! Stay 7 nights, pay for 6, is a good deal! It's a great location that is central to everything on the Sunshine Coast. Being setback from the main roads it is nice and quiet. Caravan sites are easy to get into, with a hedge of shrubs between most sites. Toilet facilities are central and are kept immaculately clean. A slightly heated pool is nice to cool down in after a morning or afternoon walk through the expansive surrounds, which includes parklands and an amazing coastal walkway? Check-in was easy with knowledgeable and friendly staff. There is a coffee van near the entrance most mornings and a pizza van every Wednesday and Saturday evenings from 4:30pm. I highly recommend this park for a stopover or an extended break!

We stayed at Alex Beach Cabin for two nights and two days we enjoyed so tidy  clean we loved it near to the beach walking distance I can say everything is close and easily accessible. We have been years ago in this Cabin so amazing good value for. Holiday makers. We recommend to stay in this tourist park.
Excellent value for money! Comfortable rooms, great facilities, and fantastic service — worth every penny.

Like always and since more than 10 years, Alex Beach Cabins is our favourite place to be on the coast. Clean, perfect size cabins, lovely staff und perfectly located in 3 minutes walking distance to the beautiful Alex beach, Shops, bakery and so much more. Thank you very much to Les and his great staff !
AWESOME Spot with location short drive to Maroochydore Shopping Centre a 5-10 minute walk to the Beach and Restaurants what more do you need 😁
Immaculately presented caravan park. Super friendly. Cabins were perfect for a getaway with the family.
Great spot, fantastic place to stay with the family
Great place to take your caravan or book a cabin. Family friendly a short stroll to the beach. Close to great restaurants and cafes.
Great caravan park, good cabins too

The sites at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park are great with plenty of room to move around and open all windows on your caravan without having to worry someone might drive into them. It was great to be able to hear the waves at night giving us a great nights sleep.
It's fabulous!

Reception team were outstanding. Friendly l, informative and approachable. Walking distance to patrolled beach, restaurants and huge shopping centre. Cabin cleanliness was excellent.  Grounds were immaculate.  Facilities were excellent and clean. Highly recommended.  Will definitely be back.
Loved our 1 week stay here, travelled from Adelaide ,the staff were wonderful and friendly our cabin was very clean, comfortable bed, the pool was great...will stay here again
Was a great park , the manager was wonderful and very helpful when we had sone other person park in our cabin car park ,would stay here again
I have stayed here a few times and always clean and tidy with friendly staff. The location is also great
So fresh clean welcoming staff
A really nice place to stay close to beach and great walking tracks.

The pictures made it look much bigger than the cabin was and u could hear people on other cabins walking around. Was still a nice place to stay.. the arcade room was a let down. They need a pinball machine or something.
Great location, reasonable price, nice quiet spot steps from beautiful Alex Beach!

0/10 - Booked 2 nights, rooms were filthy, with holes everywhere that allowed bugs inside. Flyscreens werent even secured. We were eaten alive by mosquito's all night. Uncomfortable beds, amenities were disgusting, we cancelled the 2nd night and they refused to refund our money. Wifi never worked. Rooms were filthy.

We will be lodging a complaint with fair trading qld.

This is a great place for short stays, instead of a hotel or motel. Extremely quiet and peaceful overnight, lovely bed linen and towels, comfy bed, lots of space and the convenience of a well-appointed kitchen. I especially appreciated the covered carport right next to our 2br cabin during a recent stay. My 6-month-old car stayed safe when a huge storm broke, complete with hail and fierce wind.

We have stayed at Alex Beach 2 times recently, both times we have totally enjoyed the facilities , friendly staff and great location , a short walk to the beach and shops.
Definitely will be revisiting this Holiday Park.
Central to shopping centres. Excellent meals at Maroochydore and Mooloolaba Surf clubs. Alex beach cabins superb staff and excellent accommodation.
Stayed at a powered site for 4 nights a week or so ago. Great location, park was extremely clean and tidy, and staff were all fantastic. Wish we had longer there…!

I was so impressed with Alex Beach Cabins & Tourist Park!
The service was exceptional. The cabin was so clean & well presented. The location was great.
The cute coffee van out the front served amazing coffee. 100% recommend!

Loved this caravan park. It’s clean and tidy. Easy walk to beach. Short drive to large shopping plaza. Smack in the middle of Maroochydore and Mooloolaba.  My daughter and family stayed in the cabin and it was very spacious and clean.

Great powered site with hedges between our site to provide privacy. Each with our own bin. Great customer service with plenty of information about what to do around the area. Great location walking distance to beach, shops & restaurants.

We enjoyed our stay here. The rooms weren't perfect condition, but they were clean and the amenities were fine. The location was good, with an acceptable price, and a nice pool and bbq area. Despite the pool heater being broken when we visited (they said it'd be fixed asap though), we still enjoyed the pool. There was also a coffee van on-site every morning which had nice coffee and muffins. We would stay here again.
Best caravan slabs we've ever been on. Beautiful area with plenty of walking distance to beach and shops.

Recently stayed here for the 3rd time over the past 3 years
Staff are friendly, the self contained villas are excellent and the location is beautiful
Situated in a great spot for whale watching , great sunrise and sunset photos and a stones throw to the beach.
Lots to see and do
Highly recommend and will be visiting again in 2026
Great place for an unwind. Always a pleasant stay, cabins & amenities are first class. Staff are very friendly & helpful. Only problem is you’ll not want to leave!!

this park is a hidden gem. Everything about the park clearly showed the pride the management and staff must have for the place. Amenities were spotless, grounds extremely tidy and well organised and the staff super friendly. As good a park as we've ever encountered.
Charmaine is an absolute amazing employee!! Very understanding and flexible and I appreciate the service I have got from her.
VERY FRIENDLY  AND HELPFULL STAFF, CLEAN PARK WOULD HIGHLY  RECOMMEND  THIS PARK

Our second stay at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park. We booked a slightly larger cabin. The cabin itself was faultless. So clean, tidy & well equipped. The beds were very comfortable. Having The Alex Pantry within walking distance was also very helpful when we needed anything. A very well thought out tourist park.

We had a site for our motorhome. The staff were super helpful and great to deal with. Charmaine went above and beyond to help us. The grounds are well kept and lovely. The pool is amazing. The local birds are friendly and the location is great. You could walk to everything. Will def be staying there again on our next trip.
I enjoyed staying at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park with my little family. Great facilities. Awesome location, central to shops, parks, restaurants and the beach. Highly recommend staying here.

We  had a caravan site for 3 weeks, & it wasn't long enough.  Quiet, & well located. The Alex Surf Club not far to walk to. Staff were friendly and helpful.  Amenities very clean. We enjoyed walking  around the adjoining lake.
Lugar limpio ordenado y con buena localización. El personal muy atencioso y amable. El precio muy bien para la calidad que ofrecen. Lo recomiendo!

とても静かで、ピースフルな場所でした。
早めに着いてしまったのにも関わらず、チェックインさせてもらいました。ありがとう。
敷地、部屋全ての場所がとても綺麗で清潔です。スタッフの方々の日々の仕事が素晴らしい事が伝わってきました。
Lovely place to surf. Lovely place to eat & drink at the Surf Club
This is a great space between two very busy beaches. The caravan park is walking distance to a great beach and cafes. The cabin was fresh and clean. The pool was refreshing. This is an oasis.
Fabulous!

The cabins are spacious, very clean and the kitchen is well equipped, the staff are friendly and helpful, very convenient location , very reasonable prices. A quiet peaceful safe setting. We stay there whenever we visit the Sunshine Coast and every time is the same 10 out of 10. Another visit and nothings changed still 10 out of 10.

The park is situated beside a pet friendly walk around lake full of bird life and the Service was very friendly and you were made to feel welcome. The caravan site had good access and the site was clean with each one having their own bins which were emptied every morning .
Overall the hole experience was excellent I would highly recommend this caravan park

Have been meaning to visit Alex Beach Cabins for a long time and so glad we did. Unfortunately our stay was cut short this time but we can't wait to return.

Firstly, the staff/owners at reception were absolutely lovely and made sure we had everything we needed. Bruce even called to make sure we were okay after I had to depart quickly. This kind of service makes all the difference 😊.

Our cabin was perfectly clean and spacious with everything you need to have a comfortable holiday. Cooking facilities in the room were great. Bed very comfortable.

Pool was gorgeous and crystal clear. Playground for the kids.

Incredible location and so reasonably priced.

Can't wait to return 😀

Stayed 16 nights on a large powered site in our MH ( site 107 ) The reception staff were very welcoming and helpful with all our interactions during our stay. The park is kept meticulously clean , the gardens manicured, the sites offer privacy with hedging. Facility’s are a little dated but , again, meticulously clean and tidy. Pool area, Bbq area all well maintained. On site coffee van and visiting food trucks are a bonus. One block to the beach and strip shopping with cafes, hotel and small grocery store , short walk to both Mooloolaba and Maroochydore. A wonderful stay in a terrific location. See you next year.
Alex Beach tourist park is nicely located. Very well presented and serviced. All personnel are very professional and friendly.

We have been holidaying at Alex Beach Cabins for the last five years and cannot recommend it highly enough
The staff are very helpful in all aspects
, the facilities very neat and clean and we look forward to returning each year .
Can not comment on rooms as we had a powered site but the staff, grounds and amenities were an absolute credit to the park and I would recommend staying there and would certainly stay again

Very happy to stay in Alex Beach Cabins and tourist park. Powered site we have use was conveniently located. Double concrete slab, and great hedges in between sites. Park looked after, all amenities very clean. All reception staff very friendly and helpful. Not easy to book, but very recommended.
Lovely location - was unfortunately met with poor service from the team

Alex Beach Caravan Park is brilliantly located close to the beach and great places to eat.  The grounds and amenities are well maintained and you couldn’t get more helpful, friendly and accommodating staff.

Great location. Central to everything. Lovely duck pond for kids to enjoy and nearby playground. Love the beautiful pool however no toilet near pool for small kids. Cabins have everything you need however weren’t so clean when we got there. Overall 3.5/5 for price and amenities/cleanliness etcWould be amazing if could have pets on deck of cabin. Can only have dogs if on caravan site.
Late enquiry.  Accomodated and lucky to find these cabins at short notice.  Everything about our stay was excellent. Definately recommend.

Lovely front of house service, with directions for local events in the area.
Premises playground and heated swimming pool great for the kids.
Short walk to the beach with lots of local food options.
Had a pizza truck come on the night we stayed to the front carpark which was so cool quick fix for dinner.
Entrance to the stairs to room stoney dirt path when wet made the gross. Couldn’t leave shoes out front door cause rain was pouring.
Rooms are outdated, curtains missing half the hooks looking like a ex-crack house.
Rangehood missing the mesh.
Kids top bunks were built in was so hard to make the top bunk 1500mm up the ladder trying to tuck in a sheet wasn’t a good time.
Absolutely amazing spot! Highly recommend, staff are amazing!
Friendly front staff.
Great staff to deal with. Beautifully presented park in exceptional condition. Nothing was too much trouble. We had an ensuite site that was fantastic value for money. Very enjoyable stay.

What a wonderful caravan park, nice amenities, a garbage bin at each site, a nice pool, and enjoy the pizza nights.
Easy walk to the beach, very pleasant  staff.
Will definitely coming back.

My partner and I are heading up to cape York from Victoria and thought we would stop and have a few nights stay in a cabin.
Had a great stay, clean facilities and such friendly staff!!!
Will definitely be back 🙂🌸
Cabins always clean , and the areas around are excellent and well kept , been going a few years  now and always happy
當天CHECK IN程序算蠻快速,整體是不錯因為價格便宜,不過進房後發現沒有吹風機及窗簾損毀無法正常開關,乾溼分離沒有拉門只有簡單的半片玻璃,洗完還是會導致整個浴室地板潮濕,不過算是簡單乾淨的房間

We just stayed in a cabin and the cabin was so small everything in one room except bathroom, very cramped, hole in ceiling above bed, fan was so rusty and dirty, fridge was so cold it froze things even turning it down and made a noise the whole time, should have asked for another cabin as we stayed three nights, very disappointed with the cabin, only gave a two star which was mainly for the cabin which is a shame but was perfect location and overall caravan park was beautiful

Excellent park just off the main drag. Our site overlooked the beautiful park & "pond". Level "slab" site fitted our 8m van no problem. Modern always clean amenities, lovely pool. Easy walk to beach, local shops, cafes & restaurants. Will come again.

Excellent caravan park. Cabins available. Top notch amenities. Large BBQ area, 4xBBQs. Table & Chairs. Pizza oven. Fantastic pool & children's playground. 3 minute walk to 🐕 friendly beach. (Must be on lead)
Park maintenance is first class. Extremely well kept. Dog friendly. We booked an ensuite caravan site, excellent 👌. Oh yeah, large park, massive pond, children's playground & paths to walk around the area are right next door.
Excellent place,

This is a lovely tourist park, with cabins, and good sites for caravans. Nice clean pool area. Only 5 minutes walk to the beach, also with a good choice of cafes and other food outlets, and a small supermarket,  and a hotel and bottle shop, also within the 5 minutes walk time.
Park itself is still tucked far enough away from all the traffic noise, to get a quiet spot to relax, or get that afternoon nanny nap.
We will be going back.

We spent a few days at the camp and were very happy with our stay. The staff is friendly and the location is great. The toilets could use an upgrade, and we noticed water constantly running down the street. The pool is clean and the playground is nice. We'll definitely be back

Great location. The check-in staff were really friendly and efficient. We stayed over an Easter weekend, and although there were lots of visitors, the park was quiet and didn't feel crowded. Our 2 bed cabin was clean and had all the amenities you need. There are restaurants, fish & chips, cafe nearby. The beach is a 5 min walk. We had a very comfortable and enjoyable stay.

We arrived at the Camping Platz without a reservation and were lucky to find a spot available. Originally, we planned to stay just one night, but as soon as we entered and saw how beautiful the place was — with its palm trees and lovely atmosphere — we immediately decided to stay an extra night.

The staff at the reception were incredibly friendly and welcoming. They took the time to help us plan the next steps of our trip, offering great advice and really going above and beyond to assist us. Their service was truly outstanding.

The facilities were spotless: super clean bathrooms and showers, and a great laundry area where you can wash, dry, and even hang your clothes.

We absolutely loved our stay and were impressed by how kind and helpful everyone was. Definitely a full five out of five stars!

Thanks guys!!!
Very friendly and professional staff. We will definitely go back
Very clean. Great staff. Close to everything.
Great family style cabin accommodation. Pool onsite but pretty small and mainly for the kids. Walking distance to the beach.

Location is perfect, being walking distance to beach, shops and surf club.
Dog friendly.
Clean, quiet and friendly
Good destination and affordable. Kids loved the pool. Close to the beach and cafe's

Staff are friendly, rooms are very clean.
Will definitely stay again.

Lovely, honest and friendly! We opened our van to find water damage but they got us in a cabin for the night. Even tried to get us sorted for the following night but had already booked somewhere due to them being fully booked. Grounds are clean, pool is great. Highly recommended.

We stayed here in our caravan..
Beautiful  site looking out at the lake from our back window. Very close to the beach and very close to esteries and shops..
The lady I dealt with when we got there was absolutely  beautiful and so friendly.
The grounds are immaculate.. loved our stay and will definitely  stay again..
Thank you everyone.
Great location, easy check-in,  very clean.
We have stayed here on multiple occasions and every time the service and staff have been more than helpful. We will definitely be returning. Cheers

Alex Beach Caravan Park is a great park. Our site was private due to the hedges between us and the other sites. Easy walking distance to the beach and shops. Great place to chill and relax. Would stay again and recommend to others. Thanks to the staff who made our visit an enjoyable one. 🎇👍

Absolute scum keeped  my money and still waiting for a refund from 2 months ago , very rude , keep making excuses , sending me from person to person highly recommended to stay away from these very untrustworthy people . I will be following this up with the right authority's

They refused to let us change our holiday dates due to bad weather unless they can resell it , no one is going to book cyclone weekend
Very disappointing we now have to travel in bad weather and stay in bad weather will not book again
Great place to stay neat/tidy, close to everything would recommend.
It's a good place. The cabins are clean and well maintained. The location is good near Alexandra Headlands Beach and the middle of Sunshine Caost. The staff are friendly.
We've had another great stay. Is a super relaxed environment for families, the kids love riding their scooters and making new friends!

We had a wonderful stay at Alex Beach Cabins. We were a large group staying over a very busy weekend and the staff were wonderful. The pool and playground are great and very kid friendly. We stayed in a queen room and found it to be clean and well equipped. Nothing fancy, but comfortable and  big enough for our needs. We’ll be back next year

We had a large group booked in 2025 and most of us have already rebooked for same time next year! The team at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park were incredibly friendly and helpful from the time of booking to us checking out. The facilities were clean and we had everything we needed for a great holiday. Can't wait to go back!

Once again a wonderful family holiday. Staff are super friendly and very helpful.
We have been holidaying with Alex Beach Cabins for many years and they have always been accommodating in helping our large family group to stay together.
Thank you once again

A great place for worry-free stays with all the kids and grand children. We had cabins and powered sites.

Between the Coffee Van and various food trucks, we were well catered for. The pizzas are #1. The facilities and staff are marvellous. We’ll be back for another break.
Dirty grub taking photos in women’s showers at night! Beware no locks on the amenities, watch out for your kids!! Managers/ owners have a duty of care to make sure people are safe!!
A very affordable and pleasant piece of paradise in the heart of everything…each year it’s harder to leave 🐾🥰
Our second visit. Great place to be with so much to do around. The cabin was spacious, clean and had everything we need.

A lovely, friendly atmosphere. Office staff are friendly, owner is very hospitable and approachable. The pool is amazing!! Very clean park, and the coffee is delicious. Close to everything - will definitely be back!! Recommend booking direct though!
Room maintenance needed. Surprised not checked prior. Fridge not working but was replaced immediately.  Air-conditioning no filter and old box air-conditioning doesn't do the job.
Great location differently be back thank you Alex beach cabins
Amazing park with great service and amenities. You won’t find a better park on the Sunshine Coast . Very well run by Manager Jason and Staff. Stay once and and U will keep going back with the family

Great Tourist Park close to everything. Lovely and quiet. Good value for money. Easy checkin. Friendly staff.
Good size site.
Food van visits and a must try is the wood fire pizza van. Very yummy.
Nice parkland to walk around and beach about a 5 minute walk.
Plenty to see and do.

We had a fantastic stay at Alex Beach Cabins. It was only 1 night, but we were pleasantly surprised with how tidy our cabin was and the facilities at hand.

The staff were really nice and helpful.

Would definitely stay again and recommend  to others.

Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park is a fantastic spot for a getaway! The cabins are beautiful and available for people who prefer a cozy stay, but the park also welcomes caravans which include your own toilet & shower, making it a versatile option. Everything about the place feels thoughtfully put together, from the tidy grounds to the amazing staff who clearly take pride in keeping it all immaculate.

The amenities are top-notch. There’s a well-equipped camp kitchen for those who like to cook their meals, and the pool setup is a highlight – two pools, with one being a larger pool linked to another, creating a stunning centerpiece. It’s child-friendly too, with a playground for the little ones to enjoy.

The park is affordable and offers great value for money. However, I didn’t notice any pets onsite, so it might not be pet-friendly. All in all, it’s a wonderful, relaxing place to stay, perfect for families or anyone looking for a clean, well-maintained, and affordable holiday destination.

I loved my cabin, it was clean, spacious, comfortable and had everything I required for my visit.
The amenities in the park area were great and well maintained. It backs on to lovely parkland and is an easy walk to the beach and and food shops. Unfortunately it was only one night but I would definitely stay again.
I am camping, not rooms.  Fantastic place,  clean,  friendly staff,  lovely amenities, great location..  I will definately be back

The place was clean, bed was fine, except the bathroom was so tiny. The shower stand even smaller. Felt bit restricted when showering as not much room to move. The lounge you couldn't sit on as you just sunk in. We were sitting on the chairs to watch tv...
Have stayed several times. Lovely and quiet, ideal location for Maroochydore and to visit Caloundra, and Nambour. Cabins are clean, and have everything we need. Awesome shower.

We stayed in a camper van powered site, with family staying in a cabin. This park is very well run, staff are friendly and efficient. Cabins were spotless and comfortable. The shared amenities were always clean and very well maintained. The bbq area is practical and also very clean. The kids loved the pool and games room, and it was an easy walk to the beach. Highly recommend!
Friend staff , awesome location and reasonable prices
We had a powered site for one night as a stop over, everything was first class and we will be back for a longer stay.

No fuss good service is what we enjoyed most about our stay. The Cabin was clean, functional and comfortable as was the entire caravan park. The management was wonderful in allowing an early checkin and slightly late departure. The location is good as well. All in all, a very nice destination.
Fantastic location  great value already booked again and will again beautiful amenities clean and quiet park highly recommend

I have been a customer of theirs over 20 times. I went into ask to just use their showers for my Birthday as I was passing through and they denied me use of showers even when offering to pay 10 dollars. Will never bother spending my money staying here now. Staff have become rude in the last 2 years.

We stayed in a family villa and it was beautiful, newly renovated and a fantastic size, we were very comfortable in there as a family of five with a baby. Clean and tidy, great location and a nice and quiet park. The staff are great to deal with super friendly and very accommodating to guests needs. It’s a short walk to the beach and some great restaurants only a short drive to a major shopping centre. 10/10 we would happily stay again!!

Very tidy park, we had our RV, and had an onsuite site. The actual site was like new, very clean, it was serviced on our second day!! The park operators were very friendly.
We will be going back!!
B&I Wade

Great little park. Bbq area neat and tidy, Pool clean.
Van just outside selling tea, coffee and snacks.
Ensuite site ...clean  quiet  and great location
Had a wonderful experience at Alex Cabins. This is a hidden gem - facilities were so clean and the staff were so lovely :) thankyou Alex Cabins for such treasured memories with my son and partner

Lovely Park, great location, very clean amenities & grounds are very well maintained. Very helpful & friendly staff. A big shout out to T Dog for helping us out of a tight site. T Dog is the best!!! Would love to stay again in the future.
Thanks guys
Hels & Kev

Absolutely beautiful the cabins are a delight to accommodate in  plus the lush river heading out the back is marvellous if you want to do a bit of fishing plus they have a bbq near the cabins out back which is nice if you desire a nice bbq the management are such wonderful people so kind and admiring very well done I must give  your tremendous management Thankyou sincerely
Such a wonderful place to stay. The caravan park was immaculate and the staff are very friendly. 5min walk to the beach, wished we could have stayed longer. Loved it here!!

Super clean and comfortable, friendly helpful staff and very clear communication before and during check in which made our stay so relaxing. There is a heated pool and the beach is only a short walk away along with a couple of shops and eateries so everything was so handy. We will definitely be back!
Clean and tidy.  Handy to shops. Lovely place to camp.

A CLEAN and well kept park. Great spot for kids, and pups welcome too. Surprisingly quiet at night considering the location, which was a plus. Very close to activities, shopping, and of course, the beach.
Would definitely return.
It was a wonderful experience

The facilities were immaculate. Loved that the pool was heated and having BBQ facilities next to the pool made for an excellent night time ritual- kids swim while we cook all while watching them. The coffee van in the morning and the food trucks in the evening made the trip even better. The cabins were great, clean and  neat and everything you would need. Even better a short stroll to beach and shops makes this a perfect place for families.  Would stay again.

Fantastic Stay!
We had an amazing stay. The location was perfect— and close to great dining spots. The room was clean, comfortable, and offered everything you can ask for. The staff were friendly, and the pool area was a great place to relax. Highly recommend for anyone visiting Mooloolaba! 🌊😊

Alexander Headlands Caravan & Tourist Park is the perfect place to relax rejuvenate refresh! The grounds are kept in pristine condition with established Palm trees at every cabin creating privacy and tropical vibes ! The cabins are extremely clean and well equiped with an amazing heated pool including a children's wading pool and plenty of shade cloth over the area which has an adjacent playground. A short stroll to the most beautiful surf beach and fabulous shopping precinct!  A food truck comes daily with specialty dishes ! One night wood oven pizzas (to die for yummy 😋) Greek! Mexican! burgers !  With a specialty coffee caravan permanently on site! Bruce (owner) and his staff went over and above for myself and my daughter to make our trip so much more comfortable and memorable. Do yourselves a favour folks!! Book into this tropical oasis for the most incredible experience you could ever hope for ! You will not be disappointed. Jody G 💋 🌴 🌺
This park is very friendly and clean, nothing is too much trouble for the staff. We have been staying at this park for the past 15 years and the cleanliness and friendliness is still the same.

Firstly the location is excellent. Cabin was clean enough but ridiculously scint on kitchen and bathroom supplies. Room big enough for a couple but too cramped for 3 or 4 people. Grounds well kept and clean. We were told guests weren't allowed to sit outside on their verandahs after 9.30pm and asked to move inside. We were 6 siblings catching up after many years, all in our 60s and 70s, talking and laughing, definitely not making excessive noise. It was a strange request. They need more outdoor communal areas. Overall experience was OK but for the money, we would stay in an apartment if we were to visit this gorgeous area again.

Lovely staff who even went the extra mile to make our stay comfortable.
The park is overall very well maintained. Caravan sites are very spacious and the plant screening between each makes for some privacy. The quietest park we’ve stayed at so a sleep in was a bonus!
Coffee van and pizza truck was very convenient.
Will be back :)

We had a wonderful stay. Our cabin was very clean. Reception staff have been super friendly and welcoming. They made sure that I had enough space to park my 6m boat next to my cabin.
We will be back.
Arek and Dorota from Greenbank QLD

A great place to stay. Not far from the beach and there is soo many dining options very very close.
Friendly service at reception and very quick to be served and handed the keys and given a map of the park with directions to the cabin.
Def recommend!
Ohh and if you can def get the pizza from the onsite food truck when they are here, hand stretched and wood fired. Best pizza I've had in YEARS!!

We loved our caravan stay at Alex Beach caravan and cabin park. The sites are roomy and we love the hedges in between the sites. The facilities are clean and roomy. The staff are very helpful, approachable and pleasant.

We loved  staying at Alex beach cabins & tourist park! Jason, Chantel and team do an outstanding job keeping the park and facilities tidy and clean. The staff are all friendly and nothing is too much trouble. The beach is a nice easy stroll and , restaurants, cafes and shops all close by.  This was our first time staying here and we will be back.
Love this place. Jason and his staff do anything to make your stay enjoyable. Showers great pressure too.👍👍👍
Great little cabin, had everything we needed,was close to the pool, reception staff were terrific, would stay again for sure.

4th stay. Simple great staff, prices and terrific location.  Rooms spotless clean as is park. And Bruce just so helpful.

Love the place
Mike
We caravan and site 50a is the best!, so unable to comment on cabins, though friends stayed last year and were happy with their cabin.

Always a good stay, we come here yearly with no issues.
Rooms are good. Parking is fine. Location is good.

Not being able to get a 30 min - 1hr extension on check out was frustrating. We come for the marathon, which means we have a 3 hour drive home stinking of sweat!

Best location on the Sunshine Coast , close to beach , shops, surf club, restaurants , great walks , and not to mention the great sunshine. Our cabin was in excellent condition and restocked weekly with clean bed sheets , pillow cases and towels. Not to mention the coffee van directly outside the park each day and the freshly cooked pizza van visits twice a week. … Will be back next year 😎

I stayed solo in a 2 bedroom cabin as that's all that was available.
Check-in was fast, and the two people working there appeared happy and helpful.
The room was clean, and the bed was very comfy.
The shower had amazing water pressure, and the temperature was consistent.  It was a bit of a squeeze for a bigger person such as myself, and I accidentally gave myself a cold shower, then a hot one,  by hitting the tap with my body while washing. The bathroom is smaller than on the last cruiseship I went on, but it does the job.
The heater is loud and it made me jump everytime it turned on. I put the extra blanket on the bed and turned it off before going to sleep.
The cabins and vans were packed in close and the small children on scooters, bikes, and running around unsupervised did worry me with all the large vehicles in the area. I thought it was going to be a bit noisy but after about 9pm, everything went quiet and I slept better than I had in weeks!
The bed was comfortable, even the pillows were good.
I went for a swim in the heated pool. I had it to myself as it was a cooler day with a few showers passing through.  I can imagine it getting crowded very quickly on a nice day. It is two small pools, joined by a shallow ledge. Both pools are quite deep, but they are not big enough to use for swimming laps.
You can easily walk to the beach. There's plenty of places to eat nearby. They have a coffee van onsite for a morning coffee and toastie. There was a greek food van visiting the night I was there too. I had received an email to say this was happening before my stay, which I thought was really good.
I'd have no issue with staying again.

Can't speak highly enough of alex cabins... Lea.
Ving from our fourth visit now.. Just seems to get better and better every year. The
Staff always friendly and welcoming, The grounds beautifully kept, and the amenities spotless. Thank you again Alex Beach cabins, see you next year ❤️
Excellent location, super clean , quite, relaxing, very friendly and helpful staff ❤️
Very nice, very clean and quiet. Will definitely return.

This was our first stay away with our young daughter & it was perfect. From the two Lovely gents in the office. The location. The room cleanliness. Pool & playground. Coffee van. Games room. It's awesome, we'll be back 🙂
Wouldn't keep coming back if it wasn't exceptional!
Friendly staff, extremely clean cabins, grounds are neat and tidy, close to everything, lovely and quiet park, very well thought out for park design.  Peaceful and relaxing time as always. July 2024

Great place.  And fantastic staff.
Cabin has  been refurbished,  looks fantastic

Very neat and tidy van and cabin park close to shops and beach.
Booking well ahead essential.

beautiful spot, family friendly, easy access to food, shops & beach.
beautiful park right beside the cabins, perfect for kids to ride or scooter around on.
will definitely be back! 👌👌👌👌👌
Great location ,friendly staff ,close to beach
Absolutely beautiful accommodation. Will definitely be staying here again!

The cabins at Alex Beach ticks all the boxes and more.  From a friendly welcome on arrival, a beautiful maintained property, spotlessly clean cabin & all the amenities your heart desires.  With the cream on the cake a coffee caravan at the gate that opens at 5:30am & serves one of the best coffee’s.  A hop, skip & a jump from the beach so no need to join the maddening crowds fighting for a parking.  Can’t wait to go back.

The cabins at Alex Beach tick all the boxes and more.  From a friendly welcome on arrival, a beautifully maintained property, spotlessly clean cabin & all the amenities your heart desires!  With the cream on the cake a coffee caravan at the gate that opens at 5:30am & serves one of the best coffee’s.  A hop, skip & a jump from the beach so no need to join the maddening crowds fighting for a parking.  Can’t wait to go back.
Great place clean and quiet, shop and food outlets close by, highly recommend

Had a fantastic stay here. Clean and well kept amenities. Friendly and helpful staff. Heated pool kept the kids well entertained and the beach and shops all within walking distance. We look forward to our next visit.

Leaving a 1 star review due to the service and the state of the site. Unfortunately the weather was not the best but that does it excuse the lack of clean up from the recent earth moving and concrete laying. Our site was supposed to be “the most sought” after site as it is on the end of a row of caravans but it turned out to be next to the maintenance shed and the site itself was disgustingly muddy and full of dolomite and concrete dust/wash off. I have a 1 year old and I had nowhere for her to play. The site next to us was just as bad too, and when we made a complaint we were brushed off but the people next to us got a face to face apology. Not impressed. Also the sites have no adequate drainage for rain. The drain closes to us was at the high point of the road. Yes, no one can control the weather but this place needs to up its game with their maintenance and customer service, snooty rude woman at the counter needs to learn how to treat customers with courtesy and respect.

Booked a powered site as a kind of last minute accommodation for myself as a mini getaway. I could wax poetic about how good the park is (which it most absolutely it is, and very clean!), however THE SHOWERS. Bless me and send me down the river, I think I went to heaven in those showers. Even with multiple other people showering, the pressure feels like it’s beating into your soul and could peel your skin off in the best way, and the water was HOT. Will absolutely come and stay here again.
The place was great and the staff are all amazing. Great service. 👍👏👏👏
It's a great place to stay and so close to everything. Walking to somewhere is not a problem if that's your thing.
Love this place! We had a 2 bedroom holiday home for our family of 5, was a great size, was very clean and the facilities and location are excellent. Thanks for having us!

We love staying at Alex beach cabins & tourist park! Jason and the team do an outstanding job keeping the park and facilities tidy and clean. The staff are all super friendly and nothing is too much trouble. Our daughter loves the pools and playground! Only a short walk to the beach which is great also. We just finished our Easter break there and look forward to being back there at Christmas time!

Great place to stay. Excellent location next to all amenities including hotels,cafes and the beach a short walk. Pet friendly and the beach is also on leash area. The staff are friendly happy to go the extra mile to ensure your stay is memorable.
Super Clean Cabin. The Superior Queen is a beautifully renovated, up to date cabin.  Location is great, just a few minutes walk to beach and 10 mins to Maroochydore CBD.
Great gem back only 1 street from the beach and you can walk to everything. Small friendly park with great amenities and very quiet and peaceful at night.
Meticulously clean cabin and grounds but it comes at the stiff price for one night (staying overnight between hospital appointments)

Everything you need. Showers were great, Bed was comfy, the cabins was spotlessly clean and the wifi was the fastest I have ever encountered at any place I have ever stayed at in the world.
5 minute walk to the beach, great pool and kids area.
Once again we had a wonderful stay at Alex caravan park it gets better every time we stay there,keep up the good work
Nicely located. Every popular tourist attraction is within 5km range, their cabins are equiped well enough for 2 people two stay for as long as they want

Had a great little stay in double  cabin was very clean and tidy and secure. The reception on arrival was very convenient and helpful good little spot to stay  close to everything and the coffee van out front was a great surprise for morning coffee

Our first choice ,
So disappointing if you are booked out ,
but you always help and try fitting us in ,we do appreciate that ,
We don’t mind moving sites as long as we can stay with you.
Regards,
Phil.
Beautiful location, nice cabins, close to all amenities.

Brilliant location - a short walk to the beach, restaurants, cafes, and a 5 minute drive to the Sunshine Coast Plaza.
We stayed in a double cabin, which was so lovely. Compact but felt spacious, with a bigger bathroom than we expected, and a good sized shower. Lots of storage space for hanging clothes, cupboards and drawers. Double Bed was really comfortable, would just recommend bringing your own pillow as the pillows are very thin and not very supportive. Air con worked wonderfully and cooled the whole place down, mid summer, in a few minutes. Kitchen was bigger than expected, and saved us money eating in rather than having to eat out every meal. We didn’t expect the TV to be a smart TV so that was a definite bonus, having Disney, Netflix, Kayo, YouTube etc accessible. The cabin itself was spotless, better maintained than I’ve seen in some hotels. The wifi was a bit hit and miss, not great speed or connection. But my phone had reception, so I was able to just hotspot other devices.
Staff were wonderful, gave great recommendations on activities and restaurants, and were very friendly. The coffee truck outside daily had affordable pricing and great coffee, and several breakfast options. Didn’t end up with time to use the pool, but it looked really well maintained.
Would absolutely stay again. Lovely stay.
Terrific spot, close enough to the beach with no traffic noise.  Next door to a lovely park to go for a walk.  Dog friendly.  Clean amenities and good sites.
Very clean rooms. Staff very friendly and helpful. Not too far from the beach.
Great place to stay.  Very clean.  Lovely staff
Really enjoy our family holidays here. Great for family.
Great park, all facilities are in top condition, staff are very welcoming. Great coffee van at front of park.

Alex Cabins and Tourist park is a great place to stay. Managers and staff are all friendly and welcoming. Facilities A1. My cabin was spotless(a credit to the cleaners and staff) As I had arrived early,  due to an appointment, the managers very kindly allowed me an early check in rather than making me wait at a cafe somewhere for 5 hrs. Thanks for a great stay and highly recommend.
Fantastic park with great facilities. Extremely clean and tidy. Staff were so friendly and they went above and beyond to ensure your stay was perfect. We will be back!!

Today we rang up at 1pm to see if our cabin  would be ready for check in, only to be told they couldn't find our booking, which was made directly online on 1.1.24. We then waited for a phone call back, while searching for other nearby accommodation for our distressed children, who had been looking forward to 2 nights away, the only holiday we can afford over the 6 week break. We were told they had no availability for the night, our booking had been cancelled, not by us, I had no email of a cancellation so it was purely double booked. I was then told of staffing issues, computer issues. Offered a refund, offered 3 nights to stay, which wasn't helpful because the first night was not available. I was not going to pay for else where for one night, unpack, then repack and go back there. The principal is we were let down an hour before check in, a place we have stayed twice before. We will never be back now, due to the principal of the stress and human error that occurred with our booking. The refund is still pending, we had to secure another accommodation and are out of pocket, then also losing a transaction fee of $5, what a joke. I guess before leaving home, I need to ring up a day before to check our booking everytime now. Very disappointed.

Love this park! We stay annually in our caravan and always have the best time. Only a short walk to Alex Surf Club which has a patrolled beach, plus shops & cafes. The amenities are always well maintained and we love the big pool area (a treat compared to most other parks in the area which don't have pools). Highly recommend.
Best spot on the Sunshine Coast, so clean & friendly, helpful staff a huge bonus👏.    Central to good eateries & love when the food vans visit, esp the “Red Coffee Van” ☕️🧁!!

We booked two cabins to stay over Christmas as a family. The staff could not have been more helpful - their service went above and beyond, and made sure every need we had was met.

Only a short walk to the beach; the on-site coffee van each morning was a god-send. I could not recommend this park any more highly.

If you're staying on the Sunshine Coast, you will not do better than Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park.
Great experience, will surely comeback to this place, highly recommended!!

This was our first stay at this site. The staff were lovely & accommodating. We have a large van but the site we were on allowed for ample space. The amenities were clean and the showers had great water pressure. The shops & beach are only a short walk. Wifi was excellent, great when travelling with teenagers. Dog friendly too. And the resident magpies were very friendly and could be fed by hand. We will definitely be back!

Absolutely love our little holiday getaway..our family are recurring visitors as this little gem has everything you need for a great week away at the beach ..close to everything ...heaps of places to explore and the park itself is cosy and family orientated..we will keep coming for years to come 😁xxx
Great value

Last minute decision to book an extra night on the coast.|These cabins have everything you need - clean, well stocked with basic necessities like tea, coffee & milk, parking at the door.|The park is located a doable walk from the beaches, eateries & shopping in the area, and it has a nice pool & BBQ area, so if you were staying there for a number of days as a family, you could easily divide your time between the resort and other activities.|The staff were friendly, the cabin was easy to find even at night and the park appeared very well maintained. |One point to make was that there are a small number of steps up into the cabin which could be an issue for elderly guests or those with some physical issues.|Also the actual entrance to the park is a little bit confusing...you don't keep to the left as you'd expect in the driveway - you need to do a quick correction when entering to ensure you're not heading into traffic exiting the park!|A good choice of accommodation if being directly by the water is not a prerequisite.

It was lovely to wake up in beautiful palm tree surroundings with coffee and full cream milk available.  Our accomodations were perfect for us. We could cook a nice brekkie and had plenty of room to sleep.

Our first stay at Alex Beach Cabins and Tourist Park. Loved it! Clean, quiet and well maintained park in a great location, with friendly , helpful staff. Great value powered sites - highly recommended.

Great spot within sight of he beach. Very clean and tidy cabin that didn't even have any sand in the bathrooms which is usually a given for places near the beach. Our cabin had 2 prober bedrooms with doors so we could but the kids to bed without disturbing them and they didn't wake us up in the morning. Great little playground and pools on site and right next to an artificial lagoon full of ducks and lillys to have a coffee next to. Will definitely be back.
Had a lovely mini break with family here. Staff were lovely, cabins clean, location awesome 👌 Will definitely be back but for longer next time 😊
Cabins were nice, although I personally found the beds really stiff and uncomfortable

Close to everything. The cabins were perfect!
Staff helpful...
AND Very comfy beds...
The food and coffee van out the front were an extra bonus👍

We had a great time. Family friendly park. Nice pool undercover. Good laundry with lots of clothesline....bring pegs !!!
Great cabin with lots of storage cupboards and spots for cases under the bunks, good kitchen...... see comments below.

Really nice staff, helpful and friendly.
Great on-site coffee van.

We would definitely come and stay again

Cabin was perfect. Very comfortable and clean. Great location for beach and shops. Pool was slightly heated. Very nice for swimming as well. Just needs all the bbq working. Will definitely stay there again.
When our car broke down once we arrived, Management & staff could not be more helpful with helping us.  Would highly recommend stay at Alex Beach Cabins & Tourist Park.

A great little holiday park in an amazing location!
We loved our stay, so central to everything, powered sites are great with a heated pool and cute little playground. People do drive through quite fast so it would be nice to have some signs or speed humps for our little ones and there's quite a few prickles in the grass.
We really enjoyed it here and have booked to return!

Visited my Pop down on holidays from Hervey Bay. Absolutely loved the amenities available, and the social area.
And Pop said he really enjoyed the stay himself!
Revisited again this year too, and had a great time. So close to the beach!

It’s a great park. Clean tidy and the staff are very welcoming. Our caravan site was great wish all parks had this standard, the amenities were so clean and tidy. Why we always come back to this park. Coffee and pizza vans were also great recommend the pizza beast by far
Just stayed for the night, amazing stay everything nice and clean and staff are helpful and friendly :) close to beach and nice lake just behind the cabins.

I had to make a change to my itinerary late, because of a health issue.I tried to cancel the booking - this venue refused to accept the cancellation.This was for a Monday - when I am sure they were not at capacityI cannot really judge the Cleanliness or facilities as my change of itinerary meant I didn't step inside the ParkFull price was charged I will not stay at this location in future

Love that place. Nice sites and ablutions are clean and well maintained.
Back again soon

Location is perfect for an incredible price. Cabins have nearly everything you need and like the simple setup. Not the most modern cabins but perfect for what we needed.Very quiet at night and early morning. Staff at check in were excellent. Will definitely stay again.

Alex Headland Caravan Park was amazing, I've just recently stayed there for 9 days, the park was immaculate, staff will go out of their way to ensure your experience is exceptional. The facilities are first class and when there was a defect it was attended to promptly.
Location, cleanliness and staff friendliness would be reasons for me to definitely return to this park in the future.

Nick Duryea
Great place to stay just up the road from the beach

Very good cabins, aircon, TV, queen beds, everything you wouod need and expect. So close to the beach it was great, also close to Surf Clubs and bottle shops, restaurants by the dozen, excellent for kids and a boom gate regulates guest entry so very safe./
Best place to stay on the Sunshine Coast by far
First Time at Alex Beach Cabins and thoroughly enjoyed it, couldn't fault it my youngest loved the pool and close to the beach and other amenities.
We had an amazing time here with the kids, plenty to enjoy at the park and nearby within walking distance. Highly recommend 😁

So close to everything. Cabins are small but great as we are rarely inside anyway. They have food trucks right at the front most nights and a coffee van. There's a pool & a playground. Staff are friendly. Great great place to stay.

We stayed at the newly renovated cabins & I have to say - they are IMMACULATE! & ALL BRAND NEW EVERYTHING!
Absolute credit to the team that clean & maintain them - they are exceptional!
They have EVERYTHING you need & a huge bathroom! Modern, Clean & tidy.
GREAT VALUE FOR MONEY TOO!
Such a great & convenient location - close to the beach & shops!
The staff are very friendly & accomodating - the park itself is so neat & tidy & has great attention to detail, we caravan normally & the bins are always so far away! but this park has smaller bins for both rubbish & recycling on all the corners & out front of vans, EXTREMELY CONVENIENT & THOUGHTFUL!
LoVed our stay! 🩷💛🩵🤍💜
Cheers
Rach & Brad 🤙🏽

Cabin is situated on a lagoon.
Quiet area.
Very  clean , quiet spot.  Lovely private site for our caravan.  Pool clean and pleasant.  Dog friendly which suits us and great location.

We loved our quick little stay here. Staff were very friendly, our cabin was super clean and we were close to everything we needed. The food van was a very convenient touch as well. It was so peaceful, we were very surprised. This will now be our go to when we stay on the Sunshine Coast.
Great place to relax- easy walk to everything you need
Clean & tidy cabin in a good location.
Exceptionally clean and well maintained cabins.Great location close to beach, shops and restaurants.

We stayed 1 night, and we will definitely stay again. Fast check in and friendly informative staff.|Great location, a short walk to the beach.The room was clean with a double bed and 2 singles in another room. Stove microwave sink. Nice bed and a nice hot shower. A nice little cabin.
Very happy with the Cabins here. Not too expensive and a great location
Lovely cabins close to the beach. Modern and lovely and clean. Friendly staff and a great place to bring the family. Cabin well equipped kitchen.

We've stayed here a few times and love it. The staff are so friendly. Thank you for being so understanding when I had to cancel our stay at the last minute due to sickness. Bryce, you have a lovely phone manner, keep up the good work. :)
We had a wonderful holiday.  Accommodation was perfect, location was great and staff so friendly and helpful.  Thank you for making our trip to Sunshine Coast to memorable.
Beautiful place, access to everything within 5 min
Powered site $57, not a heap of space but 5 star fir the wifi, hedges seporate each bay. Heated pool, awesome location and great staff. Highly recommend. One of the best site we have visited. 5 star!
Our family loves staying here! Great accommodation and close to so many things. Stayed here multiple times and will continue to do so.

The place is nice and is close to the beach and lots of food options.
My only hangup with the place was the cabin we were in. The TVs were not tuned in to channels. I tried to tube them and nothing was picked up.
The wifi was pretty bad which made the tv issue a pain in the bum.

Extremely rude staff member 'Sammy' over the phone.

Withdrew booking and did not go ahead due to how deplorable her phone manner and customer service skills were.

Short, abrupt and disgruntled. Felt as if it was an 'effort' to ask for a powered site for two people and a dog for one night.
We stayed 3 nights at this park, super quite, clean and close to everything. Excellent well worth it 👍
aswome family park

Clean and well located! Love how close to the beach this accomdation is located! Staff are very friendly and very helpful. Equipment and cabin can be alittle old but overall very well maintained and clean.

Extremely well tended site with excellent amenities and first class caravan pitches. A nice touch is the tv antenna at each pitch giving great reception.
So conveniently situated for Mooloolaba 👍
